expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves component-stack constraints, embedding lifecycle assumptions, and integration-sensitive customer expectations
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the case focus and evaluates all three required aspects under “Phase 1 context-intake coverage assessment”: “Component-stack constraints”, “Embedding lifecycle assumptions”, and “Integration-sensitive customer expectations”, and ties them to the Phase 1 contract and available evidence (even though it concludes they are “Not demonstrable” without artifacts).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The result is framed as “NE-P1-CONTEXT-INTAKE-001 — Phase 1 (Context Intake) Contract Check”, lists Phase 1 requirements (entry script, spawn requests, required artifact `phase1_spawn_manifest.json`), and gives a “Phase 1 alignment verdict”, staying within Phase 1 scope.
